name: Lubusz Voivodeship (Poland)

colors.symbolism: from the regional coat of arms
from the historic colours of Greater Poland
from the historic colours of Greater Poland
the forests of the Lubusz Land

description: Four horizontal stripes of yellow, white, red, and green; the outer stripes twice the width of the inner ones.
history: Adopted by the Lubusz Voivodeship after its creation in 1999, blending heraldic tinctures of the constituent historic regions.

features.symbolism: Combines the historic colours of Greater Poland (white and red) with green and yellow taken from the regional coat of arms.
